title: Master Plan
html: Stub. Phrase Yahir uses for his life-document. Earliest corpus appearance in 2022 05 06 to do: "start chilling on master plan" — a deliberate strategic deceleration of long-range planning during busy term-time. Predates the Austin thesis / Outpace / mom house goal cluster that gave the master-plan real content years later. Promote on next use as named life-document.
